overview.summary: Model score 8 vs user score 7 (gap 1). Primary drivers: Location Stability, Session Duration, Mental Readiness. Agreement classification: MODEL_HIGHER.

result.why_difference: Policy anchored on historical averages, which may not reflect session-specific context and subjective readiness.

prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.audio: Audio trend captured noise profile correctly, but distraction weighting should increase when speech overlaps sustained ambient noise.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.vitals: Vitals alignment was acceptable, but confidence should be capped when biometric coverage is sparse.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.motion: Motion context should stabilize interpretation, not override adverse audio conditions.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.gps: GPS changes should trigger context shift checks, but not directly drive concentration score changes.

judgment_policy_next_run: Increase audio penalty when speech and moderate-to-high ambient noise co-occur.
Use uncertainty-aware scoring for short sessions with incomplete multimodal coverage.
